summary: Completed Stage 3 Authentication System testing for CrickPredict PWA. Backend APIs working perfectly, frontend auth flow has integration issues.

integration_issues.issue: Frontend auth flow resets to welcome screen after PIN entry, preventing successful login completion
App always goes to registration flow (PIN creation) instead of detecting existing users and switching to login

passed_tests: API Root Endpoint (/api) returns correct app info
Health Check API (/api/health) shows MongoDB healthy
Auth Registration API creates user with 10000 coins
Auth Login API validates phone and PIN correctly
Auth Wrong PIN Error shows remaining attempts
Auth Me Endpoint (/api/auth/me) returns user profile with token
JWT Token Expiry configured for 7 days
Welcome screen displays with Get Started button
Phone input screen with +91 prefix and validation working
PIN creation screen with 4 digit inputs working
Backend APIs all working correctly via curl testing
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend authentication flow integration - app resets to welcome screen after PIN entry instead of completing login/registration. Backend APIs are working perfectly. Issue appears to be in AuthFlow.jsx or auth store integration.
